news.t: AdvisorShares ETFs Earn Five-Star & Four-Star Morningstar Ratings™
AdvisorShares Focused Equity ETF (Ticker: CWS) Earns 5-Star Morningstar Rating™

holdings.infoBox: CWS is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Comfort Systems USA stock at 8.03%, IES Holdings at 7.55%, Casey's General Stores at 6.40%, Allison Transmission Holdings at 4.72%, and Mueller Industries at 4.72%.

overview.description: The AdvisorShares Focused Equity ETF (CWS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed ETF that aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation and outperform the S&P 500 Index by holding a focused group of US-listed stocks using proprietary models. CWS was launched on Sep 20, 2016 and is issued by AdvisorShares.

data.title: AdvisorShares ETFs Earn Five-Star & Four-Star Morningstar Ratings™
data.text: Investment strategies based on the expertise of Nasdaq Dorsey Wright and Crossing Wall Street's Eddy Elfenbein recognized for their risk-adjusted returns. BETHESDA, Md.
